ratingDrivers.description: Context Grounding: The body's unknowns and open questions have drifted behind the model's own changes.
Evaluability: Requirements are assessable from recorded evidence; the stale body context caps the shared requirement's rating.
Lifecycle Maintenance: The changelog records why the model changed; the body has not kept pace with those changes.

localAnalysis.rationale: The model's structure and changelog practice follow the guides; its body judgment context has drifted behind the model.
